prompt: A dreamy kawaii 3D render in a lush flower garden at night, filled with glowing pink neon graphics and soft sparkles. In the center, a small doll-like girl is shown from behind, with long silky blonde hair and a white bow headband, wearing a pastel blue pinafore dress over a pink puff-sleeve blouse with white trim. She gently reaches up to touch the mouth of a large white rabbit character standing in front of her. The rabbit has oversized upright ears, glossy black eyes, rosy cheeks, and a cute plush-like face, and wears a light blue uniform-style jacket with a tiny gold badge over a white body. Surround them with dense greenery, daisies, and abundant pink blossoms in the foreground and background. Across the top, place large glowing Korean neon text reading {argument name="headline text" default="가특하구나~"} in bright pink bubble lettering with a soft halo. Include exactly 7 additional neon or UI-style decorative elements: 1 heart-shaped sign at the upper left with the word {argument name="top sign text" default="CUTE"}, 1 neon star sign on a white cabinet at the upper right, 1 glowing heart outline near the rabbit on the right, 1 retro pink computer-style floating window on the left with tiny toolbar details and a central heart graphic containing the text {argument name="window text" default="you're so precious"}, 1 large glowing heart outline at the bottom left, 1 pink handheld virtual pet device at the bottom right showing a tiny bunny sprite, and 1 small glowing crystal heart near the device. Add soft bloom, glossy highlights, magical glitter particles, pink rim lighting, shallow depth of field, toy-photography styling, and a nostalgic cute internet aesthetic with pastel pink and blue as the dominant palette.
translatedPrompt: 一张梦幻般的 3D 卡哇伊风格渲染图，展现了夜晚郁郁葱葱的花园，充满了发光的粉色霓虹图形和柔和的闪光。画面中央，一个小巧的玩偶般女孩背对镜头，留着柔顺的金色长发，戴着白色蝴蝶结发带，穿着粉色泡泡袖衬衫，外搭淡蓝色背带裙，边缘有白色装饰。她正轻轻伸手触碰面前一只大型白兔角色的嘴部。这只兔子有着超大的竖立耳朵、亮黑色的眼睛、红润的脸颊和可爱的毛绒质感脸庞，身穿带有金色小徽章的浅蓝色制服式夹克。周围环绕着茂密的绿植、雏菊和前景与背景中繁茂的粉色花朵。在顶部放置巨大的发光韩语霓虹文字 {argument name="headline text" default="가특하구나~"}，采用亮粉色气泡字体，带有柔和的光晕。包含 7 个额外的霓虹灯或 UI 风格装饰元素：左上角一个心形标志，上面写着 {argument name="top sign text" default="CUTE"}；右上角白色柜子上的一个霓虹星形标志；右侧兔子附近的一个发光心形轮廓；左侧一个复古粉色电脑风格浮动窗口，带有微小的工具栏细节和中央的心形图形，其中包含文字 {argument name="window text" default="you're so precious"}；左下角一个巨大的发光心形轮廓；右下角一个粉色手持虚拟宠物设备，显示着一个小兔子精灵；以及设备附近的一个小型发光水晶心。添加柔和的泛光、光泽高光、魔法闪光粒子、粉色轮廓光、浅景深、玩具摄影风格，以及以淡粉色和蓝色为主色调的怀旧可爱网络美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 可爱兔兔花园霓虹场景：此提示词可生成一张梦幻般的 3D 卡哇伊风格插画，描绘了小女孩与白兔在花丛中的场景，非常适合可爱的社交媒体艺术或怀旧的网络美学视觉效果。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, neon, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
